product.title: Nova X Smartphone
product.description: 5G smartphone with a bright OLED display.

product.title: Nova X Smartphone Pro
product.description: Premium 5G smartphone with an enhanced camera.

product.title: Essential Feature Phone
product.description: Compact phone with long battery life.

product.title: Titan 17 Gaming Laptop
product.description: Large-screen gaming laptop for desktop-class performance.

product.title: Feather 13 Ultrabook
product.description: Lightweight laptop designed for travel and office work.

product.title: Barista One Coffee Machine
product.description: Compact espresso machine with a steam wand.

product.title: Barista One Coffee Grinder
product.description: Adjustable burr grinder for fresh coffee beans.

product.title: Daily Drip Coffee Machine
product.description: Programmable coffee maker for twelve cups.

product.title: Smart Air Fryer
product.description: Connected air fryer with six cooking programs.

product.title: Ergonomic Office Chair
product.description: Adjustable chair with breathable mesh support.

product.title: Standing Desk
product.description: Electric height-adjustable desk with memory controls.
